title: Gib's Legacy
description: A vanilla-esque modpack created for a small private SMP server.
body:
#### Support for 1.21.4x is in the works. When ready, it will be released as an alpha as bugs are to be expected. Once testing has proven the build is ready then it will be fully released. If you plan to test any alpha versions of this pack please leave feedback if you encounter any issues or missing features.

### Description:
A vanilla-esque modpack created for our small private SMP server, The Realm of Gib. This pack features many client-side tweaks and mods that improve the overall quality of life in vanilla Minecraft. It's dangerous to go alone—here, take this modpack!

### Disclaimer/Shoutout:
This pack features great performance thanks to the lovely people behind [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized). I used their pack as a base and built mine upon it. So thank you robotkoer & team for your wonderful work. Lastly, a shoutout to all the developers that have created the many mods contained within this pack. Thank you!
